oauth.accessDenied: Login was denied by the identity provider — most likely your domain admin hasn't approved OpenApe Org yet. Ask your admin or use a different email address.

card.title: Sign in to OpenApe Org
card.subtitle: Run your virtual company from anywhere

orgsIndex.heading: My organizations
orgsIndex.subheading: Each org is a virtual company with its own CEO, team, budget and reports.

empty.title: No organization yet.
empty.hint: Spin up your first virtual company. You set the vision and budget — the agents do the rest.

createOrg.title: Create a new organization
createOrg.subtitle: Start with the basics — you can refine the vision and grow the team later.

name.label: Organization name
name.description: A short label only you see — e.g. "OpenApe Inc." or "Marketing".

vision.label: Vision
vision.description: What should this organization achieve? Plain prose, the CEO reads it.
vision.placeholder: We build the open agent infrastructure for self-hosted teams. By Q3 we want shipping CI, PR review, and review-agent products.

budget.label: Monthly budget
budget.description: The hard cap the Sanierer watches. Above this it stops the CEO from hiring more.

spawn.needsGrant: You haven't authorized this org to spawn agents on your behalf. Set up a delegation grant (one-time).
spawn.idpUnauthenticated: Your IdP session expired — sign in again at id.openape.ai, then retry.

bootstrapGrant.title: One-time setup needed
bootstrapGrant.subtitle: Authorize this org to spawn agents on troop on your behalf.
bootstrapGrant.oneTime: You only need to do this once per browser/device. The grant is revocable any time from id.openape.ai.

step1.title: Step 1 — run this in your terminal
step1.description: You must be logged in via 'apes login'. The grant auto-approves because you're the delegator.

step2.title: Step 2 — wait for the iPhone DDISA prompt
step2.description: If your IdP requires per-grant confirmation, approve on your phone.

step3.title: Step 3 — click Retry
step3.description: Returns to the chart and re-triggers the spawn — runs invisibly from there. Open troop at {troopUi} if anything else needs attention.

delegation.title: Delegation grants
delegation.subtitle: Authorize this org to spawn agents on troop on your behalf. One-time setup per org.
delegation.empty: No grants yet — follow the two steps below to bootstrap.
delegation.confirmRevoke: Revoke the delegation grant for audience '{audience}'? Active spawns mid-flight will fail.

step1.title: Step 1 — create the grant on your machine
step1.description: Run this command in your terminal. You'll get an iPhone DDISA approval; once approved, the CLI prints a grant_id.

step2.title: Step 2 — paste the grant_id here
step2.description: The full grant_id from the previous step. Stored locally; revokeable any time.

empty.title: No team yet
empty.hint: Add your CEO first. Once they're on board, they can hire the rest of the team within your budget.

linkAgent.title: Link an agent to this slot
linkAgent.subtitle: Paste the DDISA email of the agent you spawned in troop. The status flips to 'active' once linked.

field.label: Agent email
field.description: Full DDISA email — usually shown in troop after `apes agents spawn …`.

add.title: Add a team member
add.subtitle: v1: you add agents manually. From M4 the CEO does this for you.

agentName.label: Agent name
agentName.description: The short name shown in troop (e.g. alice).

agentEmail.label: Agent email
agentEmail.description: The full DDISA email of the agent.
agentEmail.descriptionOptional: Optional — leave blank if you haven't spawned the agent yet. The slot is reserved and you can link the agent later.
agentEmail.pendingDescription: Leaving this empty creates a pending slot. The chart will show a dashed card with a 'Link agent' action — fill it in after you've spawned the agent in troop.

reportsTo.label: Reports to
reportsTo.description: Pick the Teamlead this specialist works under.

budget.heading: Spend (30 days)
budget.warning: Approaching the monthly budget — the Sanierer may slow hiring.
budget.overrun: Over budget — the Sanierer will stop new spawns until next cycle.

trend.title: Daily spend (last 30 days)
trend.empty: No cost data yet. Once the Sanierer is running, it will fill in daily snapshots.

reports.empty: No reports yet. The CEO writes weekly summaries on Friday; the Sanierer alerts on thresholds.

vision.title: Vision
vision.hint: The CEO reads this on every interaction to ground their proposals. Update it when your direction shifts.
vision.placeholder: What is this organization trying to achieve, by when, and why?

budget.title: Monthly budget
budget.hint: Hard cap watched by the Sanierer. Over-budget spawns require Owner approval.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.hint: Destroys this organization and all its data (members, objectives, reports, cost snapshots). Spawned agents on troop are NOT removed automatically — retire them from troop separately.
danger.modalBody: This permanently deletes {name} along with all its members, objectives, reports and cost data. This cannot be undone.
